title: Thread is gone
detail: This thread can no longer accept new messages.
reason: Threads in state=archived are not writable.

limitations.detail: The thread was archived by the user or system policy.

next_actions.title: Create a new thread
next_actions.description: Create a new thread if the user wants to continue the conversation.

agent_guidance: Ask the user whether they want to continue in a new thread.
If confirmed, create a new thread and include the previous_thread_id for traceability.
